description.en: Action instances should be callable, so subclasses must override the __call__() method, which should accept four parameters: parser - The ArgumentParser object which contains this action. namespace - The Namespace object that will be returned by parse_args(). Most actions add an attribute to this object using setattr(). values - The associated command-line arguments, with any type conversions applied. Type conversions are specified with the type keyword argument to add_argument(). option_stri...
